title: On Generative AI and Software Engineering
abstract: Hey, "you" curious about Generative AI and Software Engineering? You're in the right place! This tool is like a magic box that not only helps you write code but also turns complex technical problems into casual chat topics. Come explore with us and experience unprecedented creative fun!
abstract_zh: 嘿，“你”是不是对生成式AI和软件工程挺感兴趣的？那“你”可来对地方了！这工具就像是个魔法箱，不仅能帮你写出代码，还能把枯燥的技术难题化作轻松的聊天话题。快来一起探索吧！在这里，“你”可以体验到前所未有的创作乐趣！
